ModuleName: Hash Tables: Structure and Collision Resolution

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: Outlines the module's learning topics spanning hash table fundamentals (structure, key-value purpose, array-based design), hash function properties (determinism, uniform distribution, speed), and collision resolution strategies (chaining and open addressing), serving as a navigational overview for learners and instructors to understand the scope and sequence of the module.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: A course outline listing the major topics covered in the Hash Tables module—including what hash tables are, how hashing works, and collision resolution strategies—which learners can use as a navigational guide to understand the scope of the module before diving into individual lessons.
